title: Hoglin Cavalry│疣豬獸騎兵
description: Piglins and Hoglins are now allies, and Piglins have a chance to spawn riding Hoglins.│豬布林和疣豬獸現在是盟友，豬布林生成時有概率騎著疣豬獸。
body:
# Function│功能
1. Adult piglins have a 20% chance of spawning as mounted hoglins in crimson forests or bastion remnants.│成年豬布林在緋紅森林或者堡壘遺跡生成時有20%概率是騎著疣豬獸的騎兵。
2. Hoglins and Hoglin Brutes will not attack Hoglins.│豬布林和豬布林蠻兵不會攻擊疣豬獸。
3. If [Mobs Autonomous Ride](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mobs-autonomous-ride) (1.0.3 or above) is installed, adult piglins will automatically ride adult hoglins.│如果安裝了[生物自動騎乘](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mobs-autonomous-ride) （1.0.3以上），那麼成年豬布林會主動騎乘成年疣豬獸。
